description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a black synthetic fixed stock and a prominent pistol grip. The receiver and handguard are constructed from dark metal, with a detachable curved box magazine inserted below the action. The barrel is medium-length and fitted with a cylindrical suppressor or silencer at the muzzle, giving the weapon a distinctive profile. Iron sights are mounted along the top, with the front sight post visible above the suppressor and the rear sight integrated into the receiver. The overall finish is matte black, with metallic highlights on the barrel and magazine. The rifle's design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: A black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and a suppressor attached to the barrel. Features iron sights and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and suppressor.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the suppressor and front sight, with the barrel and magazine aligned directly toward the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, fixed stock, and the magazine's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the receiver, with the suppressor visible at the far end.
